calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Aug-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/24/26. Notes emailed to the pro per Administrator with Will Annnexed, who has not yet claimed her Letters or filed an I&A.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bradley S. Peter and Deborah K. Peter, Petitioners in Pro Per.
John Ball, interested party.

Mr. Ball, a longtime friend of the decedent, appeared and stated that he was aware of the decedent's intent to leave something to him, but he had no objections to resolving the matter amicably. Petitioners explained that they initially submitted the holographic will to the Court to allow a judicial determination of its validity but later questioned whether the will should be admitted. The Court discussed the nature of the holographic will, noting that it did not meet the conditions for a "conditional will" and that it should be treated as a valid will unless revoked.

The Court passed the matter to allow the parties to meet and confer as to how they wished to proceed. Following a brief recess, during which the parties met privately, the parties informed the Court that they had reached an agreement on how to move forward. The parties elected to proceed with the petition to admit the will, and the Court granted the petition. The Court waived the requirement of a bond, as all interested parties were present and in agreement.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Continued To May-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
